summary: Iteration 10 - Performance fix validation + correctness testing. All 5 P0/P1/P2 fixes confirmed working. 19/19 backend tests passed. Dashboard loads in 1.88s (was 30-45s). alert-limiti in 0.71s (was ~10.9s). saldo-ferie in 0.73s (was ~3.0s).

ui_bugs.issue: URL /dipendenti/giustificativi renders blank page. HRGestionale.jsx TABS array does not include 'giustificativi' tab and has no case for currentTab==='giustificativi'. Dashboard widget links to this URL but only when totale_alerts > 5 (currently 0 alerts in env so link never appears).
ui_bugs.priority: LOW (non-blocking since 0 alerts in current data)

correctness_results.prima_nota_banca_data: 477 movimenti returned with saldo progressivo - PASS
correctness_results.commissioni_bancarie_visible: €1.00 commissione visible in BANCA 2026 (not deduplicated) - PASS
correctness_results.saldo_progressivo_order: BANCA 2026 shows DESC order with progressive saldo column - PASS

action_items: LOW: Fix /dipendenti/giustificativi blank page - add giustificativi case to HRGestionale.jsx (line ~840) or redirect to appropriate page. Only critical if totale_alerts > 5 and widget link appears.
critical_code_review_comments: HRGestionale.jsx TABS array (line 724-731) missing 'giustificativi' tab ID. Dashboard.jsx links to /dipendenti/giustificativi (line 1408) but HRGestionale doesn't handle it. Fix: add {currentTab === 'giustificativi' && <TabGiustificativi dips={dips} />} in HRGestionale or redirect /dipendenti/giustificativi to the SaldiFeriePermessi page.
GestioneDipendentiUnificata.jsx is 2126 lines (>700 line threshold) - consider splitting into smaller modules
Dashboard.jsx loads alert-limiti SEPARATELY (non-blocking) - confirmed working correctly post P0 fix

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows work, 1 minor routing gap)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0/P1/P2 performance and correctness fixes confirmed working. Key verified metrics: alert-limiti 0.71s, saldo-ferie 0.73s, Dashboard 1.88s frontend load. 34 dipendenti no CF dups. 477 BANCA movimenti with saldo progressivo. Minor issue: /dipendenti/giustificativi renders blank (HRGestionale missing case, low priority since alerts=0 in test env). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_performance.py
rca_of_issue: Routing gap: main.jsx routes all /dipendenti/* to HRGestionale. HRGestionale TABS = [dashboard, anagrafica, presenze, ferie, paghe, veicoli] - no 'giustificativi'. GestioneDipendentiUnificata HAS giustificativi tab but is only used in DipendentiHub (/presenze path). Dashboard.jsx links to /dipendenti/giustificativi conditionally (when totale_alerts > 5). Fix: either add giustificativi tab to HRGestionale, or change Dashboard link to /presenze/giustificativi.
